name: Israel
summary: Day 77 of Hormuz blockade. **A4 LITANI-INDUCED ISRAELI KIA TRIGGER FIRED ON DAY 2 OF 14 WINDOW** (`watching` → **`active_fired`**): Staff Sgt. Negev Dagan, 20, of the Golani Brigade's 12th Battalion, from Moshav Dekel in the northwestern Negev, was killed by Hezbollah mortar fire in southern Lebanon on May 14 (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel primary, JNS, i24News, Haaretz, Israeli MoD primary). IDF named the soldier and confirmed location near the Litani river, where Golani's reconnaissance unit has been conducting the weeklong raid disclosed yesterday. Total IDF war toll now 937 per JNS. **Yesterday's brief explicitly added the 'Litani-induced Israeli KIA within 14 days' trigger at Day 1 of 14; that trigger has fired on Day 2 — earlier and cleaner than median window suggested.** Political consequence inside Israel is significant: Washington Israel-Lebanon talks Day 2 closing today simultaneously, ceasefire extension expected, cabinet now faces choice between (a) extending ceasefire under conditions where Hezbollah just inflicted KIA on uniformed Golani Brigade soldier in IDF-disclosed territory beyond the river, or (b) hardening response and risking collapse of the Washington architecture. **The cabinet-vs-establishment-vs-IDF triangle is now under direct operational stress.** Hezbollah launched 24 attacks on IDF positions, soldiers and military vehicles in southern Lebanon over a 24-hour window per Al Jazeera; the Dagan KIA is one consequence of that escalation. **A3 ISRAEL-LEBANON WASHINGTON TALKS DAY 2 CLOSED; STATE DEPARTMENT CHARACTERIZED AS 'PRODUCTIVE AND POSITIVE'** (Haaretz May 15 liveblog primary). Lebanese delegation under Simon Karam pressed for Israeli troop withdrawal timeline and Lebanese-prisoner release; Israeli delegation under Ron Dermer maintained no immediate withdrawal plans and prioritized Hezbollah disarmament. **Critical date correction: April-23-extended ceasefire expires 'early hours of Sunday' — May 17, NOT May 15 as yesterday's brief recorded.** Sources pre-positioning expectations for an 'extended political process' announcement under US sponsorship; Reuters/Manila Times reporting that statement will announce a ceasefire extension. Lebanese Health Ministry reported 512 Lebanese killed by Israeli strikes since April 17 ceasefire implementation (Al Jazeera). Israeli framing (JPost, JNS, Haaretz) emphasizes Hezbollah disarmament; Lebanese framing (Al Jazeera, Madamsr) emphasizes 512 dead and continued Israeli operations beyond Litani. Times of Israel and JNS led with Dagan KIA as the structural event of the day; Haaretz framed State Department's 'productive and positive' line against Israeli reality on the ground; Ynet leaning into human-cost angle; Israel Hayom (Netanyahu-coalition-aligned) has not yet editorialised on whether to extend or harden — absence is itself a signal of internal coalition dispute. **Trump-Xi joint statement that Iran 'can never have a nuclear weapon' substantively reinforces de-escalation rhetorical track** but Netanyahu's CBS 'not over until uranium removed' demand structure unchanged. PRIOR (May 14): IDF 'weeklong raid' beyond Litani led by Golani Brigade's reconnaissance unit; KIA trigger added at Day 1 of 14. — meaningful UPGRADE of yesterday's 'first publicly-acknowledged Litani crossing': the IDF itself is now framing the operation as a sustained week-long campaign, not a one-off crossing** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel liveblog May 13, JNS, Haaretz). Killed 'some 15 Hezbollah operatives' in past 24 hours; 'some 45 Hezbollah targets' total over 24 hours including command centres, surveillance posts, weapon depots. **NO new Israeli soldier KIA in past 24 hours — the new 'Litani-induced Israeli KIA within 14 days' trigger (added yesterday) is at Day 2 of 14 and HAS NOT activated.** Hezbollah fired explosive drones at Israel May 13 (Haaretz May 13 liveblog); drones triggered an Iron Dome interceptor over southern Lebanon that the IDF later said was a false alarm. Lebanese press reports 13 killed in southern Lebanon strikes (Jibsheet, Kfar Dounine, Nabatieh) including a child, woman, Lebanese army member; two Israeli soldiers wounded (CNN). **STATE DEPARTMENT CONFIRMED PRIMARY: third round of US-facilitated Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington May 14-15, Lebanese delegation led by Simon Karam, Israeli delegation led by Ron Dermer, agenda explicitly including 'complete disarmament of Hezbollah' alongside 'full restoration of Lebanese state authority' = material structural anchoring. The April-23-extended 3-week ceasefire expires around May 15, exactly as the talks finish — the timing is choreographed.** Ceasefire status verbal: Zamir's 'no ceasefire' line carries forward; coalition-vs-establishment-vs-IDF triangle continues. Haaretz 'U.S. Vice President Vance Says Progress Is Being Made in Iran Talks' May 13 ran the Vance softer line as lede, juxtaposing it against May 11 cabinet/Netanyahu hardening — Haaretz framing Vance as establishment-aligned voice of Washington and Trump as populist-aligned. JPost ran Hezbollah-drone-strike + IDF-tank-strike split coverage; JNS ran IDF weeklong-Litani-raid frame favourably (Golani Brigade Reconnaissance Unit operational pride framing). Cabinet-vs-establishment-vs-IDF triangle widening, Haaretz tilting toward IDF-establishment, JPost/JNS tilting toward coalition. Times of Israel May 14 liveblog leads with 'Iranian FM threatens UAE, claims Tehran knew of Netanyahu's visit to Abu Dhabi' — Israeli press has now operationally integrated the trilateral (Iran-UAE-Israel) framing as a single conflict surface. **PRIOR (May 13 — Litani crossing context): (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel liveblog May 12); IDF Chief of Staff EYAL ZAMIR: 'there is no cease-fire in Lebanon' — most senior IDF officer publicly declaring ceasefire dead, against Netanyahu's prior 'war not over' framing.** Material escalation of ground-tempo beyond air strikes. IDF said operation targeted Hezbollah military structures; explosive drones at troops landed in open areas. Lebanese Health Ministry recorded ≥13 killed in Israeli attacks over prior 24h; cumulative war toll now 2,704 killed / 8,311 wounded (vs 2,869 in yesterday's brief — Lebanese tally appears to draw from a different reference framework). Hezbollah continues precision strikes on IDF gatherings at al-Taybe, Shama, Biyyada, Alman-Al-Qusayr triangle, Khallet al-Raj near Deir Siryan. NO NEW ISRAELI SOLDIER KIA beyond Glovanyov (5th, May 10) — total holds at 5 since ceasefire, despite Litani crossing materially raises casualty + miscalculation risk. CGTN single-source May 12 SAM-at-IAF claim STILL NOT Western-corroborated; remains REPORTED-CLAIMED at best. **Israeli media establishment-vs-coalition gap NOW STRUCTURAL (widening further). Haaretz extended Sunday's 'As Netanyahu's War Narrative Unravels, Iran's Uranium Becomes His Lifeline' with 'With His Iran Deterrence Squandered, Trump Might Feel Forced to Resume War' (May 12) and 'What Netanyahu — and 60 Minutes — Left Out of His Interview' (May 11-12) — opinion-page but operating as most direct centre-left challenge to official war narrative of cycle. Haaretz NEWS desk (Litani-crossing reporting + Hezbollah-fighting-may-continue framing) treats Netanyahu's 'war not over' as deliberate political extension rather than military necessity. Times of Israel + Jerusalem Post ran 60 Minutes line + Litani crossing as IDF-confirmed operations.** Bennett rally framing ('alliance of draft-dodgers is crashing') = domestic political infrastructure organising against the coalition. Coalition stability narrative fraying inside Israeli establishment press while IDF-Hezbollah operational tempo is HARDENING not softening = cabinet-vs-establishment-vs-IDF triangle now visible in coverage. INSS poll (carried May 11): 61% Israelis OPPOSE ceasefire, 73% expect fighting to resume within a year, Jewish opposition to war nearly tripled (4% → 11.5%). **Netanyahu CBS 60 Minutes line carries forward — war 'not over' until uranium removed + enrichment sites dismantled + proxies neutralized — 'you go in and you take it out';** Trump-in-Beijing forces 48h pause window May 14-16. ORIGINAL CONTEXT (May 12):: WAR 'NOT OVER' UNTIL URANIUM REMOVED, ENRICHMENT SITES DISMANTLED, AND PROXIES NEUTRALIZED — 'YOU GO IN AND YOU TAKE IT OUT.'** Said Mojtaba 'alive but holed up in some bunker' — convergent with prior US intel (CNN/KVIA May 8). **Israeli media framing diverges sharply: JPost + ToI ran straight; HAARETZ published 'As Netanyahu's War Narrative Unravels, Iran's Uranium Becomes His Lifeline' — explicit accusation that uranium-removal demand is now domestic political survival, not strategic necessity. Haaretz separately: 'Netanyahu Says Iran War Not Over, Signals Hezbollah Fighting May Continue After Cease-fire' — Haaretz the only outlet treating Hezbollah linkage as DELIBERATE war-extension.** Ynet contrast headline: 'Netanyahu 2025: We destroyed Iran's nuclear facilities; Netanyahu 2026: Sites we still need to neutralize.' **INSS poll backdrop: 61% of Israelis OPPOSE the ceasefire, 73% expect fighting to resume within a year, but Jewish opposition to the war nearly tripled (4% → 11.5%).** **STRUCTURAL READ: Netanyahu publicly raising ceiling on what counts as a US-Iran deal WHILE US publicly rejecting Iran's response — narrowing landing zone from both ends simultaneously.** **A6 HEZBOLLAH EXPLOSIVE DRONE STRIKE NEAR MANARA MAY 10 ~16:00 KILLED IDF RESERVIST WO (RES.) ALEXANDER GLOVANYOV, 47, 6924th Transport Battalion, of Petah Tikva (announced May 11) = 5TH IDF SOLDIER KILLED post-April 16 ceasefire, ALL FIVE LINKED TO 'CHEAP, HARD-TO-DETECT' FPV/EXPLOSIVE DRONES** — but Glovanyov is a SOLDIER killed on border near Manara, NOT a CIVILIAN inside Israel proper; May 10 trigger window for Israeli civilian casualty from Hezbollah EXPIRED UNTRIPPED on May 10, holds through May 11-12 with no civilian casualty. IDF struck 30+ Lebanon locations May 11 (evacuation warnings Rihan, Jarjouaa, Kfar Roummane, Nmairiyeh, Arab Salim, Jmaijmeh, Mashgharah, Qellaya, Harouf); drone strike Zebdine killed 2 civilians distributing bread; airstrike on Abba killed 2/wounded 5; **FIRST BEIRUT SOUTHERN-SUBURB STRIKE SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE.** Lebanese Health Ministry ≥23 killed prior 24h; cumulative war toll 2,869. May 12: IDF strikes Adshit (3), Haris (1, 7th cumulative), Dabaal — ≥7 killed, 7 wounded (Lebanese NNA). **NEW VARIABLE MAY 12: surface-to-air missile fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft over south Lebanon; IDF launched interceptor; alerts triggered along Israel's Mediterranean coast (REPORTED — CGTN single-source as of filing; needs Israeli-side corroboration).** Hezbollah claimed 24 attacks May 11 (artillery/drones/missiles at Khiam, Deir Seryan, Tayr Harfa, Bayyada, Rashaf, Naqoura) — Hezbollah-side CLAIMED. **B10 KNESSET EXTENDED EMERGENCY RESERVIST CALL-UP AUTHORITY (up to 400,000) UNTIL MAY 31; IDF Chief Lt. Gen. EYAL ZAMIR WARNED CLOSED-DOOR KNESSET SESSION MILITARY 'NEEDS MORE SOLDIERS IMMEDIATELY' — ~12,000 additional recruits needed mostly combat troops, operational focus IRAN + LEBANON + GAZA.** Reservist exhaustion narrative growing — institutional read: Israeli political-military system is INSTITUTIONALIZING the war footing, not winding down. Reservist morale stress is emerging political variable that CONSTRAINS Netanyahu's 'go in and take it out' posture. **Trump China summit May 14-15 + WH Sit-Room May 11 weighing renewed Project Freedom restart** = forced pause window; Netanyahu's CBS 'not over' line raises pressure on landing zone.

active_triggers.condition: Iran strikes Dimona nuclear reactor directly
Channel 12/13 or Haaretz publishes IDF imminent-strike preparation on Iran track within 72 hours

recent_signals.headline: **A4 LITANI-INDUCED ISRAELI KIA TRIGGER FIRED DAY 2 OF 14 — STAFF SGT. NEGEV DAGAN, 20, GOLANI BRIGADE 12TH BATTALION KILLED BY HEZBOLLAH MORTAR FIRE NEAR THE LITANI MAY 14** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel primary, JNS, i24News, Haaretz, Israeli MoD primary). IDF named the soldier from Moshav Dekel in the northwestern Negev and confirmed location near Litani river, where Golani's reconnaissance unit has been conducting the weeklong raid disclosed yesterday. Total IDF war toll now 937 per JNS. **Yesterday's brief explicitly added the 'Litani-induced Israeli KIA within 14 days' trigger at Day 1 of 14; that trigger has fired on Day 2 — earlier and cleaner than median window suggested.** Hezbollah launched 24 attacks on IDF positions, soldiers and military vehicles in southern Lebanon over a 24-hour window per Al Jazeera; Dagan KIA is one consequence of that escalation. **The political consequence inside Israel is significant** because the Washington talks Day 2 are simultaneously underway and ceasefire extension is the expected outcome — cabinet now faces choice between (a) extending ceasefire under conditions where Hezbollah just inflicted KIA on uniformed Golani Brigade soldier in IDF-disclosed territory beyond the river, or (b) hardening response and risking collapse of Washington architecture. **A3 ISRAEL-LEBANON WASHINGTON TALKS DAY 2 CLOSED; STATE DEPARTMENT CHARACTERIZED AS 'PRODUCTIVE AND POSITIVE'** (Haaretz May 15 liveblog primary). Karam pressed for Israeli withdrawal timeline + Lebanese-prisoner release; Dermer maintained no immediate withdrawal + prioritized Hezbollah disarmament. **CRITICAL DATE CORRECTION: April-23-extended ceasefire expires 'early hours of Sunday' = May 17, NOT May 15 as yesterday's brief recorded.** Reuters/Manila Times reporting statement will announce ceasefire extension. Lebanese Health Ministry: 512 Lebanese killed by Israeli strikes since April 17 ceasefire implementation (Al Jazeera). Israeli media: Times of Israel + JNS led with Dagan KIA as structural event; Haaretz framed State Department 'productive and positive' line against Israeli reality on ground; Ynet leaning into human-cost angle; **Israel Hayom (Netanyahu-coalition-aligned) has NOT yet editorialised on whether to extend or harden** — absence is itself a signal of internal coalition dispute. **Trump-Xi joint statement that Iran 'can never have a nuclear weapon' substantively reinforces de-escalation rhetorical track** but Netanyahu's CBS 'not over until uranium removed' demand structure unchanged.
sources: Times of Israel May 15 (Dagan KIA primary + ceasefire-expires-Sunday)
Haaretz May 15 liveblog (State Dept 'productive and positive' primary)
Al Jazeera May 15 (Hezbollah 24 attacks in 24h + 512 Lebanese killed)
recent_signals.verification: Dagan KIA = CONFIRMED ACTION (Times of Israel primary + JNS + i24News + Haaretz + Israeli MoD primary); KIA trigger fired Day 2 of 14 = CONFIRMED (action crossed threshold); Washington talks Day 2 'productive and positive' = CONFIRMED (State Department primary via Haaretz); ceasefire-extension expectation = REPORTED (sources, not signed text yet); ceasefire-expiry date May 17 = CONFIRMED multi-cluster (NPR, Manila Times/Reuters, Al Jazeera); 512 Lebanese killed since April 17 = CONFIRMED (Lebanese Health Ministry via Al Jazeera); Hezbollah 24 attacks in 24h = CONFIRMED ACTION (Al Jazeera); Israel Hayom silence on extend-or-harden = CONFIRMED ABSENCE.

recent_signals.headline: **A7 IDF ANNOUNCED MAY 13 IT CARRIED OUT A 'WEEKLONG RAID' BEYOND THE LITANI RIVER NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH, LED BY THE GOLANI BRIGADE'S RECONNAISSANCE UNIT — meaningful UPGRADE of yesterday's 'first publicly-acknowledged Litani crossing': the IDF itself is now framing the operation as a sustained week-long campaign** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel liveblog May 13, JNS 'WATCH: IDF tank strike kills Hezbollah terrorist', Haaretz). Killed 'some 15 Hezbollah operatives' past 24h; 'some 45 Hezbollah targets' total over 24h including command centres, surveillance posts, weapon depots. **NO new Israeli soldier KIA in past 24 hours — new 'Litani-induced Israeli KIA within 14 days' trigger added yesterday is at Day 2 of 14 and HAS NOT activated.** Hezbollah fired explosive drones at Israel May 13 (Haaretz live); drones triggered Iron Dome interceptor over southern Lebanon that IDF later said was false alarm. Lebanese press: 13 killed in southern Lebanon strikes (Jibsheet, Kfar Dounine, Nabatieh) including child, woman, Lebanese army member; 2 Israeli soldiers wounded (CNN). **STATE DEPARTMENT CONFIRMED PRIMARY: third round of US-facilitated Israel-Lebanon talks in Washington May 14-15, Lebanese delegation Simon Karam, Israeli delegation Ron Dermer, agenda includes 'complete disarmament of Hezbollah' + 'full restoration of Lebanese state authority' — material structural anchoring**. April-23-extended 3-week ceasefire expires May 15 as talks finish — choreographed. **Times of Israel May 14 liveblog leads with 'Iranian FM threatens UAE, claims Tehran knew of Netanyahu's visit to Abu Dhabi'** — Israeli press has operationally integrated the trilateral (Iran-UAE-Israel) framing as a single conflict surface. Iran ambassador-to-China scaffolding for China-mediation arc + Trump's HEU-via-China door-opening = Israel's preferred Russia-/Pakistan-mediator architecture displaced; less leverage on uranium-removal demand structure under Chinese custodian. Haaretz May 13 ran Vance 'still making progress' as lede juxtaposed against May 11 cabinet/Netanyahu hardening — Haaretz framing Vance as establishment-aligned and Trump as populist-aligned. JPost + JNS continued coalition-friendly framing of Golani Brigade operations. Zamir's 'no ceasefire' line carries forward; cabinet-vs-establishment-vs-IDF triangle institutionalised.
sources: Times of Israel 'IDF says it carried out weeklong raid on Hezbollah sites beyond Lebanon's Litani River' May 13
JNS 'WATCH: IDF tank strike kills Hezbollah terrorist in Lebanon'
US State Department primary 'Next Meeting Between the Governments of the United States, Lebanon, and Israel'
CFR 'Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Extended for Three Weeks'
CNN Day 75 liveblog (13 killed Lebanon, 2 IDF wounded)
Times of Israel May 14 liveblog (Araghchi UAE threat)
Haaretz 'U.S. Vice President Vance Says Progress Is Being Made in Iran Talks' May 13
recent_signals.verification: IDF weeklong Litani raid framing = CONFIRMED ACTION (IDF own framing primary, ToI/JNS/Haaretz secondary); Washington Lebanon-Israel talks May 14-15 = CONFIRMED (State Department primary); Lebanese casualty figures 13 killed = CONFIRMED (Lebanese Health Ministry via CNN); 2 IDF soldiers wounded = CONFIRMED (CNN); Litani-induced KIA trigger at Day 2 of 14 NOT activated = CONFIRMED ABSENCE; Araghchi UAE threat from Delhi = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (Times of Israel May 14 liveblog primary).

recent_signals.headline: A7 IDF GROUND TROOPS CROSSED THE LITANI RIVER MAY 12 NEAR ZAWTAR AL-SHARQIYAH (~10 km from Israel-Lebanon border) = FIRST PUBLICLY-ACKNOWLEDGED ISRAELI GROUND CROSSING OF LITANI SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel liveblog primary May 12). Operation targeted Hezbollah military structures in overnight strikes. Explosive drones at troops landed in open areas. IDF CHIEF OF STAFF EYAL ZAMIR SAID PUBLICLY 'there is no cease-fire in Lebanon' = MOST SENIOR IDF OFFICER PUBLICLY DECLARING CEASEFIRE DEAD, against Netanyahu's prior 'war not over' framing. Lebanese Health Ministry ≥13 killed in Israeli attacks over prior 24h; cumulative war toll 2,704 killed / 8,311 wounded (Lebanese tally appears to draw from a different reference framework than yesterday's 2,869 — either way cumulative count rising daily). Hezbollah continues precision strikes on IDF gatherings at al-Taybe, Shama, Biyyada, Alman-Al-Qusayr triangle, Khallet al-Raj near Deir Siryan. **NO NEW ISRAELI SOLDIER KIA beyond Glovanyov (5th, May 10) — total holds at 5 since ceasefire, but Litani crossing materially raises both casualty + miscalculation risk.** CGTN single-source May 12 SAM-at-IAF claim STILL NOT Western-corroborated; remains REPORTED-CLAIMED. **Israeli media establishment-vs-coalition gap now STRUCTURAL: Haaretz extended yesterday's 'Iran's Uranium Becomes His Lifeline' with 'With His Iran Deterrence Squandered, Trump Might Feel Forced to Resume War' (May 12) and 'What Netanyahu — and 60 Minutes — Left Out of His Interview' (May 11-12). Haaretz NEWS desk treating Netanyahu's 'war not over' as deliberate political extension rather than military necessity.** Times of Israel + Jerusalem Post ran straight on 60 Minutes line + Litani crossing as IDF-confirmed operations. Bennett rally framing ('alliance of draft-dodgers is crashing') = domestic political infrastructure organising against coalition. Coalition stability narrative fraying while IDF-Hezbollah operational tempo HARDENING = cabinet-vs-establishment-vs-IDF triangle now visible. Defense sector continues falsified-trade pattern: ITA -12% since March start vs S&P +3.5%; Lockheed -13%, RTX -11% in last week of April; today ITA -0.3% / Lockheed +1.7% mild bounce on Litani crossing but defense names DO NOT bid on Lebanon escalations because contracts are fixed-price multi-year (CNBC + BofA Epstein peak-defense thesis structurally accepted).
sources: Times of Israel liveblog May 12 (Litani crossing) — primary
Haaretz May 11-12 live updates + opinion pages
Press TV (via Global Security Org) Hezbollah strikes — Iranian state
Forecast International War Dividends Q1 2026 industry
recent_signals.verification: Litani ground crossing May 12 = CONFIRMED (Times of Israel liveblog primary); Zamir 'no cease-fire in Lebanon' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (IDF Chief on record); Lebanese cumulative casualty figure adjustment = CONFIRMED (Lebanese Health Ministry primary, different reference framework note); Hezbollah strikes at named IDF gatherings = REPORTED (Press TV / Iranian state attribution); SAM at IAF May 12 = REPORTED CGTN single-source needing Western corroboration; defense-sector falsified trade = CONFIRMED market data (CNBC + sector ETF prices).

recent_signals.headline: NETANYAHU CBS 60 MINUTES AIRED MAY 11: war 'NOT OVER' until uranium removed + enrichment sites dismantled + proxies neutralized — 'YOU GO IN AND YOU TAKE IT OUT'; Mojtaba 'alive but in some bunker' (convergent with US intel). HAARETZ explicit accusation: 'As Netanyahu's War Narrative Unravels, Iran's Uranium Becomes His Lifeline' = uranium-removal demand is domestic political survival, not strategic necessity; Haaretz separately framing Hezbollah linkage as deliberate war-extension; Ynet contrast: '2025: We destroyed Iran's nuclear facilities; 2026: Sites we still need to neutralize.' INSS poll: 61% Israelis OPPOSE ceasefire; 73% expect fighting to resume within a year; Jewish opposition to war nearly tripled (4% → 11.5%). HEZBOLLAH EXPLOSIVE DRONE STRIKE NEAR MANARA MAY 10 KILLED IDF RESERVIST WO ALEXANDER GLOVANYOV (47, 6924th Transport Battalion, Petah Tikva) = 5TH IDF SOLDIER KILLED post-April 16 ceasefire, all by FPV/explosive drones; SOLDIER not CIVILIAN, May 10 trigger window for Israeli civilian casualty from Hezbollah EXPIRED UNTRIPPED, holds through May 12. IDF struck 30+ Lebanon locations May 11 (evacuation warnings 9 villages); drone strike Zebdine killed 2 civilians distributing bread; airstrike Abba killed 2/wounded 5; FIRST BEIRUT SOUTHERN-SUBURB STRIKE SINCE APRIL 16 CEASEFIRE. Lebanese Health Ministry ≥23 killed prior 24h; cumulative war toll 2,869. May 12: IDF strikes Adshit (3), Haris (1, 7th cumulative), Dabaal — ≥7 killed, 7 wounded. NEW MAY 12: SAM fired from Lebanon at IAF aircraft; IDF launched interceptor; Mediterranean coast alerts (CGTN single-source — needs Israeli-side corroboration). Hezbollah claimed 24 attacks May 11 at Khiam/Deir Seryan/Tayr Harfa/Bayyada/Rashaf/Naqoura (Hezbollah-side CLAIMED). KNESSET EXTENDED EMERGENCY RESERVIST CALL-UP AUTHORITY (up to 400,000) UNTIL MAY 31; IDF Chief Zamir closed-door Knesset: military 'needs more soldiers immediately' — ~12,000 additional recruits, mostly combat troops, operational focus IRAN + LEBANON + GAZA. **Reservist exhaustion narrative now emerging political variable that CONSTRAINS Netanyahu's 'go in and take it out' posture.** STRUCTURAL READ: Netanyahu raising ceiling on what counts as US-Iran deal while US publicly rejecting Iran response = narrowing landing zone from both ends simultaneously.
sources: Times of Israel + Jerusalem Post + Ynet + JNS + Xinhua + Middle East Eye + VINnews (Glovanyov KIA, 7+ confirmations)
Al Jazeera + Lebanese NNA + Wikipedia 2026 Lebanon war timeline + Detroit News + Democracy Now (IDF strikes Lebanon)
recent_signals.verification: Netanyahu 60 Minutes statements = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (broadcast primary); Haaretz framing = CONFIRMED primary; Glovanyov KIA = CONFIRMED multi-source (IDF + 7+ outlets); IDF strikes Lebanon + Beirut southern-suburb first since April 16 = CONFIRMED multi-source; SAM at IAF May 12 = REPORTED (CGTN single-source, needs Israeli-side corroboration); Knesset reservist extension + Zamir 12,000 = CONFIRMED (JNS + ToI); civilian-casualty trigger UNTRIPPED HOLDS — Glovanyov is SOLDIER not civilian; INSS poll = CONFIRMED (primary)

recent_signals.headline: DAY 14/14 OF TRIGGER WINDOW — IDF STRUCK 85+ HEZBOLLAH TARGETS IN SOUTHERN LEBANON IN 24 HOURS (12 KILLED INCL. 7 IN SAKSAKIYEH); HEZBOLLAH DRONES WOUNDED 3 IDF RESERVISTS NEAR MISGAV AM (MILITARY TARGETS ONLY); MT. MERON DRONE IMPACT CORRECTED — IN TERRITORY ADJACENT TO LEBANON BORDER, NOT MERON AREA; 2 SOLDIERS WOUNDED (ONE SERIOUSLY) BY DRONE IN ADJACENT TERRITORY; HAARETZ MAY 8 'TRUMP WANTS TO CUT HIS LOSSES AND END THE IRAN WAR. ISRAEL CAN'T STOP HIM' = MOST DIRECT EDITORIAL REJECTION OF NETANYAHU'S IRAN POLICY YET PUBLISHED IN CYCLE; SECURITY ESTABLISHMENT 'IRAN DEAL DISASTER FOR ISRAEL' COUNTER-FRAMING. Trigger 'Israeli civilian casualty inside Israel proper' UNTRIPPED Day 14/14 — capability demonstrated, civilian ceiling intact. Cabinet-vs-establishment-via-Haaretz gap now wider than at any point in cycle = Netanyahu's coalition has NO unified Iran-policy position = constraint on Israeli action in next 4-7 days.
sources: Times of Israel May 9-10 live blogs
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED — IDF 85+ targets multi-source primary; 12 Lebanese killed incl. Saksakiyeh = CONFIRMED (Times of Israel/Lebanese Health Ministry/PBS/France 24); 3 IDF reservists wounded by Hezbollah drones = CONFIRMED (JPost, IDF acknowledged); Mt. recent_signals.headline: HEZBOLLAH FIRST CROSS-BORDER DRONE REACH OF CYCLE — MT. MERON IDF AIR-TRAFFIC-CONTROL BASE INSIDE ISRAEL PROPER STRUCK BY HEZBOLLAH DRONE SWARM MAY 8 (NO ISRAELI CASUALTIES — MILITARY TARGET); IDF AIRSTRIKES KILLED 5-10 IN SOUTHERN LEBANON FRIDAY (PARAMEDIC, 2 CHILDREN, 3 WOMEN); 4 HEZBOLLAH MEMBERS KILLED IN BAFLIYEH CAR STRIKE SATURDAY; CABINET-VS-ESTABLISHMENT DISSONANCE HARDENS — HAARETZ PUBLISHED 'ISRAEL CAN'T AFFORD NETANYAHU'S APPETITE FOR ENDLESS WAR.' Trigger 'Israeli civilian casualty inside Israel proper within 14 days' UNTRIPPED at Day 13/14 (capability demonstrated, military-target ceiling intact). Mt. Meron is IDF's primary northern air-traffic-control facility ~8 km from Lebanon border. Haaretz May 8 also: 'Trump may have initially blundered into the assault on Iran but realized his mistake soon enough' — first time the paper has framed Trump Iran strategy positively. Right-leaning outlets amplifying Pezeshkian-IRGC factional-divergence narratives including Pezeshkian-Mojtaba meeting claim. Cabinet-vs-establishment gap wider than at any point in cycle.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED — Mt. Meron drone swarm + Lebanese casualties + Bafliyeh strike all multi-source; Haaretz editorial = CONFIRMED primary; trigger 'Israeli civilian casualty inside Israel proper' UNTRIPPED at Day 13/14

recent_signals.headline: ISRAEL ESCALATED IN BEIRUT MAY 6 — KILLED HEZBOLLAH RADWAN COMMANDER MALEK BALLOUT (FIRST ISRAELI STRIKE ON LEBANESE CAPITAL SINCE MID-APRIL CEASEFIRE); 13 KILLED IN SOUTHERN/EASTERN LEBANON MAY 5-6; FORCED DISPLACEMENT ORDERS FOR 12 VILLAGES (most north of Litani — outside Israeli occupation zones, in violation of April 16 ceasefire); HEZBOLLAH HAS NOT RETALIATED. PM Netanyahu personally announced ordering Beirut strike. Day 11/14 of Israeli-civilian-casualty trigger window (expires May 11) — directional asymmetry remains ALL Lebanese casualties, ZERO Israeli civilians inside Israel proper. Cabinet dissonance: Times of Israel reports 'Netanyahu convenes security cabinet, says he will speak to Trump about Iran developments.' Pravda Trump 'IDF preparing large-scale Iran op' = REPORTED single-source/Russian adversarial — NOT verified by mainstream Western, treated as unverified Russia-aligned framing.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED Beirut strike + commander killing (Times of Israel/Haaretz/Al-Monitor/Reuters); CONFIRMED 13+ Lebanese casualties (Al Jazeera primary); CONFIRMED forced-displacement orders for 12 villages; Pravda Trump IDF Iran-op claim explicitly NOT elevated (single-source/Russian adversarial chain)

historical_summaries.summary: 1 signals. Israel's Defense Minister Israel Katz confirmed 'preemptive' strike on Iran
9 signals. IDF launched ground incursion into southern Lebanon against Hezbollah | US struck Kharg Island | Israel struck South Pars gas field (world's largest)

42 signals. Israel accelerating military campaign alongside peace signals: IDF struck 170 targets 'throughout Tehran' in 24 hours | Israel killed Haj Youssef Ismail Hashem — commander of Hezbollah's southern front — in Beirut airstrike April 1 | IDF confirmed '170 targets in 24 hours throughout Tehran' on April 1-2
